Wolf Creek (2005)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $16,186,348Details
International Box Office $12,818,716
Worldwide Box Office $29,005,064
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $9,568,161
Total $9,568,161
Further financial details...

Synopsis

Stranded motorists fall prey to a murderous bushman who offers to fix their vehicle, then takes them captive.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$2,805,754 (17.3% of total gross)
Legs:4.31 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:55.8% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$1,100,000 (worldwide box office is 26.4 times production budget)
Theater counts:1,749 opening theaters/1,761 max. theaters, 3.2 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $30,040,339

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: December 25th, 2005 (Wide) by Weinstein Co.
International Releases: November 3rd, 2005 (Limited) (Australia)
Video Release: April 11th, 2006 by Weinstein Co./Genius
MPA Rating: R for strong gruesome violence, and for language.
Running Time: 99 minutes
Franchise: Wolf Creek
Geographical setting: Australia
Plot point: Serial Killer, Sex Crimes, Torture Porn, Tourists In Trouble
Subgenre: Isolation Horror
Source:Based on Real Life Events
Genre:Horror
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Dramatization
Production Countries: Australia
Languages: English, Swedish
